positive: A maximalist, whimsical botanical illustration featuring interconnected roots and glowing flora against a deep midnight blue background. The main subject is a symmetrical, stylized celestial bloom, reminiscent of an orrery mixed with coral. Detailed linework is paramount, emphasizing elegant curves and organic symmetry. Include glowing bioluminescent moss, intricate geometric veins running through the leaves, and small clusters of star-shaped fruit. The overall style should be a highly detailed, Neo-Art Nouveau tattoo flash design, rendered with crisp vector quality. Use strong, vibrant contrasting colors (electric teal, magenta, gold, and deep indigo) for maximum print impact. The composition must be perfectly centralized, optimized for a circular or square garment print.
negative: low detail, artifacts, blurry, noisy, text, watermark, signature, grain, bad anatomy, extra limbs, monochrome, logo, branding, celebrity
